kadhal imbuttuthaan

thiruvizha onney onnu
kaatchithaan kodukiradhe
eththana piravi thavamo
kannu munna nadakkiradhe

kanavula midhakirane.
mazhaiyila mannin vaasam

varma thandha thunai neethaan.

tamilStanzas:
பார்த்தேன்
கடவுள் போல
நிலவ நான் பார்த்தேன்

சாஞ்சேன் 
என் நெஞ்சுக்குள்ள 
என்ன சுகம் 
சாஞ்சேன்

காத்து சில்லுனு வீசுது 
காதல் இம்புட்டுதான் 
சாரல் சங்கதி பாடுது 
காதல் இம்புட்டுதான்

இடி மின்னல் 
அடிக்குது வெளிச்சத்துல.

பார்த்தேன் 
கடவுள் போல 
நிலவ நான் பார்த்தேன்

என் நெஞ்சுக்குள்ள 
என்ன சுகம் சாஞ்சேன்

திருவிழா ஒண்ணே ஒண்ணு 
காட்சிதான் கொடுக்கிறதே 
எத்தனை பிறவி தவமோ 
கண்ணு முன்ன நடக்கிறதே

தரையில காலும் இல்ல 
கனவுல மிதக்கிறேனே. 
மழையில மண்ணின் வாசம் 
மயங்கி போய் கெடக்குறேனே

வேண்டுன சாமி எல்லாம் 
வாரமா தந்த துணை நீதான்.

நெஞ்சுக்குழி தவிக்குது 
அழகே உன்ன

பார்த்தேன் ..பார்த்தேன் 
சாஞ்சேன்..சாஞ்சேன்

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Paarthen'?

'Paarthen' expresses the feelings of love and longing, portraying the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Power Paandi'?

In Power Paandi, the song reflects the protagonist's memories and emotions related to love, enhancing the narrative of the film.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Paarthen'?

The song is sung by Sean Roldan and Shweta Mohan, with music composed by Sean Roldan himself.

When was 'Paarthen' released?

'Paarthen' was released on March 9, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Paarthen' is a romantic melody that beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and nostalgia. The song unfolds in the movie Power Paandi, where it serves as a poignant reminder of cherished memories. With its soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of longing and warmth. The collaboration between Sean Roldan and Shweta Mohan adds a unique charm, making it a standout track in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Paarthen from Power Paandi is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With Sean Roldan's soulful voice complemented by Shweta Mohan's enchanting vocals, this song creates a magical atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The heartfelt lyrics by Selvaraghavan add depth to this romantic melody, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: I looked like a godly moon.
What happiness is there in my heart, I wonder?
The wind gently blows, love is a sweet song, love is a sweet song.
This is like lightning striking in brightness.
I looked like a godly moon.
What happiness is there in my heart, I wonder?
The festival shows you, how many births have passed, and what is happening in front of your eyes?
There is no leg on the ground, I am lost in dreams. I am getting lost in the rain's embrace.
You are the one who gives me support, when I need it.
My heart is longing for your beauty.
I looked... I looked, I wondered... I wondered.
I looked like a godly moon.
What happiness is there in my heart, I wonder?
The wind gently blows, love is a sweet song, love is a sweet song.
This is like lightning striking in brightness.
